textByHash.aa1eacf874cafd9a4d1e74628384d41363daa2fa: Get out of my way stinky! I've got stew to make!
textByHash.cb59659c7bc3045ee3a5c82c5b4a197f3e628d49: Yes I am. Cooky Weasel to you. Finest cook this side of, well, pick an object - or a concept - or a location! I'm the best cook any side of anything what you can think of!
textByHash.e8253c0afeffb1da88e7ca84889a0846efe9aaed: Hole?! This is a fine establishment. At least it was until you stank it up.
textByHash.4f3a69003aa2f00bef9e943c39228de8b1aa3c64: Wheeler sent you eh? Hmm... Why would I give you my good carrots? Thems for roasting with honey, not for stinking up with your grubby mitts.
textByHash.95d6a04cc31c083b9296657e859fe8f6f67d6074: Oh! Well why didn't you say so? Smells like a good idea to me. If anyone deserves some good juice, it's him!
textByHash.936b149b2046f8b399c6a875511582f421287f37: Smells like you don't have space for these wonderful carrots. Clear some room and come back when you can handle the veggies!
textByHash.a0e5dd60fcc3a5fac113ae3091f1bf2120c2bf49: There's 3 fancy carrots for you, stinky. Now go and get that juice made before your stench rots 'em!
textByHash.83ec3e7f908d82d9ecb25c1cac7e4a0e7c9e2f2b: You've managed to make carrot juice? Surprising, and it doesn't seem to stink. Almost unbelievable!
textByHash.a5e5aa377382f0fcf08d4aef19c0883eec2e970e: Smells to me like you've already got enough of my fancy carrots. Go away!
textByHash.bef2b8d2d041041f7058350a9a7497a0becc84c1: You weren't nibbling at them were you? I bet you were thinking about it.
textByHash.268b79568019dfa9db9bb0856484bf9fdb4a6ef9: Yeah right. Here, take 'em. Take all of my lovely carrots! Just make sure the Easter Bunny gets his juice this time.
textByHash.020c81cff250f87d7bff190489aa5d780f4cc888: You've been eating the carrots! I can smell 'em on your breath! You big stinking piggy!
textByHash.7663fd6dd3cef5f62ec02d12107571a3a4558085: Take these carrots and get out of my sight.
textByHash.791b8d67ee75471c0e3e93473935bb85c2f20508: You've got orange stains around your mouth!
textByHash.7de29a9f21c5a390f291cde8180a99550b66d145: YOU WHAT?!? You DRANK the juice that you made for the Easter Bunny?
textByHash.b52bd6fc889957d81fe045122dc3fef30656cb15: Oh for... Please use these carrots for their intended purpose.
textByHash.544559f795efc4027958b3871610c3769d9b297f: YOU WHAT?!? You're a real piece of work. Do you think these carrots grow on trees?
textByHash.b55bd2f552edbfa5c709667db2ead96240aea03e: Well they don't. They grow underground. And they're expensive. So either help the Easter Bunny, or stop wasting my stock!
textByHash.2f8a18892b27dcec9203d4920ba07609bda2ae6b: Keep your hands away from these lovely carrots, stinky!
textByHash.f21b818b098fb216842855c190fcf05c7900ff2c: I can smell you getting closer, stinky!
textByHash.b736a276a53f693f38e2249b6ab2c0dab64ecca8: Good, cause these carrots aren't for you, stinky!
